attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERRORS_IN_INTF)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.LINE_INT_SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.ERROR_CODE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.STATUS, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.REFERENCEID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.SOURCE_CONTROL_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.SOURCESYSTEM, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF,
 (
 select BATCH_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF
 minus
 select BATCH_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERRORS_IN_INTF
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BATCH_ID = STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.BATCH_ID  and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXGCO_SVC_ERR_IN_INTF.REFRESH_DATETIME
